title: Colored Flames Redux
description: Ported to 1.16, the old Colored Flames is back!
body:
This is a simple port of the old Colored Flames mod for Fabric 1.15, the port is temporary unless the dev has abandoned the project. Please, do report any bugs!

Link to original mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/colored-flames
